Notion AI Review (2026): Pricing, Features & Alternatives

AI features built directly into the Notion workspace for notes, docs, and databases.

MakerNotion Labs
CategoryAI Productivity Tools, AI Writing Tools
PricingAdd-on from $8-10/user/mo on top of a Notion plan
Free tierNo
WebsiteVisit Notion AI →

Best for

Teams already using Notion who want built-in AI search and writing.

Pros

  • Works natively inside pages and databases you already use
  • Good for summarizing notes and meeting content
  • Q&A across your whole workspace

Cons

  • No standalone free tier for AI features
  • Requires you to already use Notion as your workspace

Alternatives to Notion AI

ChatGPT

The most widely used AI chatbot for writing, research, coding help, and everyday questions.

Gemini

Google's AI assistant, deeply integrated with Search, Gmail, Docs, and Android.

Claude

An AI assistant known for careful reasoning, long context windows, and strong coding ability.

Jasper

An AI writing platform built for marketing teams and brand-consistent content.
